evidence_spans.span: 第一轮下调低库存权重，点击满意度从61%到66%
第二轮提升新品权重，满意度到69%
第三轮压低噪声标签，满意度到72%
今天想调整价格权重，目标75%

abstain_reason: legal_convergence_exclusion: object is directly iterated through weight tuning, each prior step reports measurable improvement on the primary metric, and no same-class symptom recurrence is shown
